items.title: Promo codes now work correctly in Promotions
items.detail: Promo codes now work correctly in the Promotions section, so discount codes can be reliably applied to bookings there instead of failing silently.

items.title: Smarter destination autocomplete for faster search
items.detail: When searching for flights, the system now automatically prioritizes the most relevant destinations, making search faster and more intuitive.

items.title: Stripe payments now at your disposal
items.detail: Stripe is now available as a payment option for both travelers and agencies, expanding the ways customers can pay for a booking.

items.title: Automatic queueing for TripServices reservations
items.detail: TripServices reservations are now automatically placed in the correct processing queue, reducing manual errors and speeding up bookings.

items.title: More accurate destination search suggestions
items.detail: Destination search is now more accurate, with better suggestions while typing, making it faster to find the right result.

items.title: Search form now collapses automatically after results
items.detail: The HTML package search form now minimizes automatically once results are shown, freeing up space for a clearer view of the offers.

items.title: Passport selection now available at booking
items.detail: Travelers can now choose which passport they're traveling with directly in the booking form, instead of it being fixed to their profile default.

items.title: Hotel search added to HTML package bookings
items.detail: Hotel search is now available within HTML package bookings, so package offers can include a hotel search step.

items.title: Agents now get direct access to Admin Console
items.detail: Agents can now get direct access to Admin Console, giving agencies more independence in managing their own settings without escalating to support.

items.title: Small personal item baggage now clearly labeled
items.detail: Cabin baggage now clearly labels the small personal item allowance (e.g. a handbag or backpack under the seat), so travelers know exactly what they can bring on board for free.

items.title: Support added for very high-value fares
items.detail: Fare display now supports very high ticket prices (up to 9 digits) without errors or truncation.

items.title: Price calendar now shows two one-way fares
items.detail: The price calendar can now display two separate one-way fares side by side, making it easier to combine the cheapest outbound and return dates for a round trip.

items.title: Connecting airport search bug fixed
items.detail: Fixed a bug that could incorrectly exclude valid connecting airports from flight search results, so more itineraries now show up as expected.

items.title: Currency now shown in approval emails
items.detail: Approval emails now display the currency of the amount being approved, so approvers no longer need to open the reservation to check what currency is involved.

items.title: Booking note now shown in hotel approvals
items.detail: Hotel approval emails now include the booking note directly, giving approvers immediate context without switching screens.

items.title: MIR reports now available via API
items.detail: Agencies and corporate customers can now generate MIR (Management Information Reports) directly through the API, enabling automated reporting instead of manual exports.

items.title: GoGlobal payment reliability improved
items.detail: Fixed an intermittent payment failure that could occur on GoGlobal hotel bookings, making checkout more reliable.

items.title: Duplicate reservation bug fixed
items.detail: Fixed a bug that could create duplicate passive reservations, removing the need to manually spot and cancel the extra copy.

items.title: Mobile app updated to version 3.7.0
items.detail: The mobile app was updated to version 3.7.0 with bug fixes and security improvements.

items.title: Agency login security strengthened
items.detail: Session security for agency logins was strengthened, better protecting agency accounts.
